description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker, specifically a Nike Air Max, featuring a combination of dark gray and pink hues with a speckled pattern across the upper. The shoe has a visible air cushion in the midsole, characteristic of the Air Max line, and a slightly dirty, off-white outsole indicating use. The upper is constructed from a mix of synthetic mesh and textile materials, with reinforced overlays for durability and structure. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with gray laces, and the tongue and heel both display the Nike logo in pink. The overall silhouette is low-cut, designed for comfort and urban wear, and the shoe shows signs of moderate wear, especially on the sole and heel.
description: A worn Nike Air Max sneaker in gray and pink with a speckled upper, visible air cushion, and standard lacing. The shoe features Nike logos and shows signs of use, especially on the sole.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the Air Max logo, visible air cushion, and the speckled pink and gray upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing, pink Nike tongue label, and rounded toe box.
description_view_2: Right side view with similar features to the left, including the air cushion and speckled pattern, but with less visible branding.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the pink Nike Air logo on the heel tab and the worn, off-white outsole.
attribute_logo: Pink Nike logo on tongue and heel tab
